---
name: Backlog item
about: Track a training task or experiment
title: "[Backlog] "
labels: training
assignees: ""
---

## Objective

What capability or artifact should this produce?

## Phase

Which phase does this support?

## Steps

- [ ] Learn the concept
- [ ] Build or test something
- [ ] Break it
- [ ] Measure it
- [ ] Document what happened
- [ ] Write what to do differently
- [ ] Commit the artifact

## Evidence

What file, result, report, or demo proves this is done?

## Notes

Add links, constraints, risks, or follow-up ideas.
